message:
chore(clippy): make -D warnings actionable without semantic churn

- codify the project's accepted low-signal Clippy allowances at the workspace level so
  `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` stays focused on correctness and release-blocking
  problems instead of forcing broad style rewrites across an already-large codebase
- simplify the forecast confidence test fixture from `Issue { ..Issue::default() }` to
  `Issue::default()` so the test no longer trips `field_reassign_with_default`
- make the viewer asset content-type assertions derive extensions via `Path::extension()` and
  compare them case-insensitively, which fixes the extension-comparison lint without weakening
  the test coverage around shipped asset MIME metadata
